nodes.name: 南美洲
nodes.summary: 南美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联70种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、大美洲鸵、北山䳍等70种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 安第斯红鹳
nodes.summary: 安第斯红鹳（Andean flamingo，学名 Phoenicoparrus andinus），分类上属于红鹳目，并归入红鹳科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于波托西省、安地斯山脈、南美洲，常见栖息地包括湿地，主要威胁包括非法猎捕。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联211种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等211种鸟类。

nodes.name: 红鹳科
nodes.summary: 红鹳科（Phoenicopteridae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如秘鲁红鹳、智利火烈鳥、大红鹳等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 安地斯山脈
nodes.summary: 安地斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联39种鸟类，包括北山䳍、达尔文拟䳍、高山斑䳍等39种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 波托西省
nodes.summary: 波托西省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括安第斯红鹳，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 红鹳目
nodes.summary: 红鹳目（Phoenicopteriformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如秘鲁红鹳、智利火烈鳥、大红鹳等6种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In the summer, they live in salt lakes, and migrate to the lower wetlands for the winter.Caziani, S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This group is working with conservationists to find a way to solve the problems of borate extraction and egg collecting and poaching. The plan consists of an environmental education strategy to inform businessmen, workers, villagers, and any other people who pose as a threat to the flamingos. Local authorities in the Salinas Lake district have created an outpost to prevent illicit actions and to find possible solutions to present problems. Creation of national parks has decreased the egg collecting; however, environmental education will be necessary to eliminate this activity. The Flamingo Specialist Group, established in 1971, is actively trying to inform the public on the vulnerability of flamingos. They produce an annual newsletter to tell readers the current status of several species. In 2000, this group conducted a census that revealed a total population less than 34,000 Andean flamingos, giving them the label of most rare species. Recently, this group has joined sides with the International Union for Conservation of Nature to create an action plan for the flamingos. A meeting was held in Miami, Florida, in 2000 to develop a group to control an action place to protect the six species and subspecies of flamingos. Under the auspices of the Convention on Migratory Species of Wild Animals, also known as the Bonn Convention, the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) on the Conservation of High Andean Flamingos and their Habitats was concluded and came into effect on 4 December 2008
